description: Shared project-level definitions for research report schemas.

identifier.description: General-purpose unique identifier: {prefix}-{YYYYMMDD}-{sequential}. Lowercase alphanumeric prefix, date, zero-padded three-digit sequence.

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier. Use "unknown" when not available.

pmid.description: PubMed ID. Use "unknown" when not available.

title.description: Full title of the cited work.

authors.description: Author list as a formatted string (e.g. 'Smith JA, Jones BC'). Use "unknown" when not available.

journal.description: Journal or venue name. Use "unknown" when not available.

year.description: Publication year as four-digit string. Use "unknown" when not available.

citation.description: Reference to a published academic or professional source.

url.description: URL where the source was accessed.

platform.description: Platform name (e.g. 'jd_com', 'tmall', 'pubmed'). Use "unknown" when not determined.

sourceReference.description: Reference to a sourced record with provenance metadata.

evidenceLevel.description: Quality-of-evidence rating following standard evidence hierarchies.

claimSupportLevel.description: Degree to which available evidence supports a claim.

findingSeverity.description: Severity rating for an audit finding or discrepancy.

dateString.description: ISO 8601 date string: YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD. Use "unknown" when the date is not known.
